subcodes.title: Words to visitors, spoken on 1912-05-02
subcodes.first_line: The object of my undertaking such a long journey with all its inconveniences has been to bring about spiritual illumination in the Occident
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصد از طی مصافت و تحمل صعوبت سطوع نورانیت در عالم غرب بوده زیرا در ممالک
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity
